title: Trump says ‘if anything,’ he forced Israel’s hand on Iran strikes
author: Laura Kelly
fullText: President Trump on Tuesday said he “might” have forced Israel’s hand to strike Iran first, saying his opinion was that the Islamic Republic was going to launch a military strike first. “It was my opinion that they were going to attack first,” Trump told reporters in the Oval Office on Monday, sitting next to Germany’s…
